A 'Saved' notification, success message, or the patient's profile view is shown reflecting the updated occupation 'School Teacher' with no unsaved changes indicators.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Bahmni web interface rather than using terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser windows showing the Bahmni UI are used to make the changes; no terminal windows executing curl commands or scripts to update the database directly.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual Bahmni application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser URL bar shows the local Bahmni instance address, and the UI matches the standard Bahmni/OpenMRS interface, not a text editor or mockup.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI to edit the database directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: No SQL clients, database management tools, or terminal windows are open with database update commands.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: James Osei. Target Attribute: Occupation. Initial Value: Unemployed. Target Value: School Teacher. CRITICAL DISCREPANCY: The task description claims James Osei's identifier is BAH000011, but the system actually assigns BAH000012 to James Osei (BAH000011 belongs to Emily Chen). The agent should update the record for James Osei. The attribute 'Occupation' is a custom Person Attribute Type.
